channel.title: about on MyBlog
channel.description: Recent content in about on MyBlog

item.title: About Me
item.description: > Whoami Hello friend, I am 0xAtharv , you may also know me as 0xLoneWolf / Xy0nix. Im a CTF player and Undergrad student. Im a pwner & reversing player. Currently learning more about Kernel pwn and Operating Systems. This blog was created so that i can document the writeups of various challenges i solve in CTFs and also to better under more complex security-related topics . I am always ready for a challenge ;)
item.content:
> Whoami

Hello friend, I am 0xAtharv , you may also know me as 0xLoneWolf / Xy0nix.

Im a CTF player and Undergrad student.
Im a pwner & reversing player.

Currently learning more about Kernel pwn and Operating Systems.

This blog was created so that i can document the writeups of various challenges i solve in CTFs and also to better under more complex security-related topics .

I am always ready for a challenge ;)

> Contact

you can reach out to me on :

Discord:0xLoneWolf#9627
Twitter:0xAtharv Hack The Planet !
